source_jobs.title: Sr Video Content Producer - Brookhaven
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.




ROLE OVERVIEW

Brookhaven is one of the most-played experiences on Roblox and home to one of the platform's largest communities.

As Brookhaven continues to expand its content presence beyond the game itself, we're looking for a Video Content Producer to help coordinate and scale our growing content ecosystem. From YouTube series and creator collaborations to community-driven content initiatives, you'll help bring ideas to life by keeping projects organized, stakeholders aligned, and production moving smoothly from concept through publication.

🌟 If you're equal parts organized producer, creative collaborator, and project manager, this is an opportunity to help shape content seen by millions of players around the world!




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Own the Production Pipeline

You'll build and run the systems that keep Brookhaven's content ecosystem moving smoothly across multiple formats and stakeholders.

 - Own and maintain the master content calendar, ensuring content plans align with franchise priorities, game updates, and publishing schedules

 - Manage day-to-day relationships with external production partners, guiding projects from initial brief through concept review, rough cuts, revisions, and final delivery

 - Build clear workflows between internal creative stakeholders and external collaborators, including editors, animators, voice actors, and creators

 - Establish review and approval processes that maintain a high quality bar while keeping production moving efficiently

 - Proactively identify risks, capacity constraints, and resourcing challenges before they impact delivery

Connect Creative to Production

You'll help transform franchise ideas, stories, and lore into content that can be executed effectively and consistently.

 - Translate creative briefs, narrative objectives, and franchise priorities into production-ready plans, timelines, and deliverables

 - Ensure production partners and collaborators have the context they need to execute content that feels authentic to the Brookhaven universe

 - Review content throughout production, ensuring deliverables align with franchise goals, brand standards, tone, and audience expectations

 - Identify creative drift early and provide feedback before projects reach final stages of production

 - Serve as a bridge between creative vision and production execution

Run the Creator & Community Loop

Brookhaven's community is a valuable source of ideas, trends, and storytelling. You'll help build the systems that connect community insights back into the content strategy.

 - Partner with Community and Social teams to monitor player trends, fan theories, creator activity, and emerging content opportunities

 - Surface insights and community signals that can inspire future content initiatives

 - Manage creator and community content submission workflows, including player clips, creator contributions, and community spotlight opportunitie

 - Build relationships across the creator ecosystem and identify creators who align with Brookhaven's brand and audience

 - Support creator partnerships by coordinating briefs, resources, approvals, and communication throughout the production process

Coordinate Across the Franchise Team

You'll be the operational hub connecting content production, creative direction, game updates, and external partners.

 - Coordinate regularly with franchise, creative, community, and game teams to ensure alignment on priorities and timelines

 - Maintain visibility across all active projects, ensuring stakeholders understand what is in devel

source_jobs.title: Security & IT Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

Voldex is hiring a Security & IT Specialist to support and improve how our devices, systems, access, and security processes are managed and secured across the company. 💡

This role sits at the intersection of security, systems, and day-to-day operations — owning how devices, access, and internal tools are managed across a growing, remote-first company. You’ll play a key role in shaping how we approach device management and security, from defining standards and improving processes to ensuring teams have reliable, secure access to the tools they need to move quickly.

This isn’t a purely reactive IT role. It’s an opportunity to build, improve, and take ownership of how security and internal systems scale. You’ll identify gaps, implement practical solutions, and help establish clear, scalable processes that support a high-velocity environment.

Working closely with cross-functional partners, you’ll balance strong security practices with speed and practicality — ensuring that what you build strengthens our systems without slowing down development workflows.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Support and improve Voldex’s security practices and internal device management across a scaling remote workforce. Ensuring secure, reliable, and efficient foundations that support high-velocity game development

 - Design, implement, and maintain company-wide device configuration, security, and compliance standards (e.g., encryption, access controls)

 - Establish clear, documented standards, processes, and self-service mechanisms for device provisioning, access requests, and lifecycle management, enabling teams to operate independently with minimal ongoing support

 - Partner closely with Engineering and other teams to implement process, tooling, and security changes in a way that does not negatively impact development workflows or release timelines

 - Proactively identify risks and inefficiencies across devices, systems, and access processes, then contribute practical, scalable solutions that strengthen security posture while preserving speed and team autonomy

 - Support identity and access management (including SSO, least-privilege principles, software distribution, and auditability), ensuring teams have secure yet frictionless access to the tools they need

 - Manage device lifecycle processes (provisioning, configuration, maintenance, and secure decommissioning) while continuously monitoring device health, security posture, and compliance

 - Secure & regularly audit external platforms (e.g., Discord, Roblox groups, and internal tools), ensuring appropriate access controls, permissions, and protection against misuse or compromise

 - Evaluate and recommend tools and technologies that improve security maturity, automation, and operational efficiency as the company scales




WHO YOU ARE

 - Strong written and verbal English communication skills

 - 3+ years of experience in IT Administration

 - Experience managing device environments and security within a remote-first or distributed company of similar size or larger than Voldex

 - Strong attention to detail when handling permissions and system access

 - Ability to manage and prioritize multiple requests across teams

 - Comfortable working independently and taking ownership of internal systems and processes

 - Experience managing access and permissions across SaaS tools (e.g., SSO software, Google Workspace, admin panels, etc.)

 - Experience working with MDM platforms and familiarity with endpoint security best practices

 - Comfortable evaluating and recommendi

source_jobs.title: 3D Art Generalist - Driving Empire
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

🏎️ Driving Empire is one of the largest driving games on Roblox, with billions of visits and a passionate global community. We're looking for a 3D Generalist to help shape the world players explore every day—from houses and city environments to props, roads, event spaces, and partnership content.

In this role, you'll create high-quality, performant 3D assets that align with Driving Empire's distinctive visual style while meeting the technical demands of a live Roblox experience. You'll collaborate closely with the Art Lead and game team, bringing creativity, craftsmanship, and optimization expertise to everything you build.

If you're passionate about Roblox creation, love building immersive worlds, and enjoy seeing your work reach millions of players, we'd love to hear from you!




 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Design, model, and deliver high-quality 3D models covering areas such as buildings (interior and exterior) and environmental assets, individual items and props, and partnership collaborations

 - Follow defined art-production pipelines, processes, and documentation to ensure efficient creation, optimization, and integration of items into the game

 - Collaborate closely with the art lead to address artistic challenges, ensuring assets are completed on time, efficiently, and within the defined technical performance budget

 - Apply creativity and player insights to asset creation, ensuring each asset aligns with the art lead’s direction and the game team’s goals

 - Implement feedback from the art lead to ensure all items meet quality standards, align with the artistic vision, and satisfy technical requirements
   
    


WHO YOU ARE

 - 3+ years of professional experience as a 3D Artist in Roblox, or equivalent freelance/independent game development experience

 - Strong Roblox Studio experience with a deep understanding of optimization and performance best practices

 - Strong knowledge of mesh topology, efficient asset creation, and optimization techniques

 - Portfolio showcasing Roblox environments, buildings, houses, map locations, or similar stylized game worlds

 - Ability to adapt to and execute within an established art style

 - Strong communication skills and a collaborative, feedback-oriented mindset



Nice to Have

 - Passion for cars and car culture!

 - Experience working with licensed IPs and established brand guidelines

 - Experience building roads, cities, or large-scale environments

 


TECH STACK

You may use some or all of the following tools:

 - Maya/Blender/3DsMax

 - Roblox Studio

 - Substance Painter/Designer

 - Photoshop or Equivalent

 - Marmoset Toolbag

 - ZBrush or Equivalent

 

Voldex is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status or any legally protected status



Permanent Voldex employees enjoy the following benefits:

💰 Competitive compensation - above-market salary + profit sharing + stock options

⛳️ Retirement benefits  - company contribution to your retirement plan (401k, RRSP, Pension), in Canada, UK and USA!

🩺 Medical, dental, and vision benefits - depending on the country, there may be additional benefits (Life, ADD, etc…) such as Canada, UK and USA.

🏖 Flexible PTO - vacations + Federal / Bank Holidays

🌎 Remote First - we have always been remote and will remain that way including work from home/anywhere 

🎮 In-person get-toget

source_jobs.title: Sr. Partnerships Manager
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

At Voldex, we partner with some of the world’s most recognized brands to bring bold, immersive experiences to life across our portfolio of games. As a Sr. Partnerships Manager, you’ll help ensure those partnerships are seamless, impactful, and built to scale. 🚀

In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with VP Growth, game teams, and brand partners to deliver campaigns from kickoff through post-campaign reporting. It’s a highly cross-functional position that blends strong project management, clear communication, and analytical storytelling — ideal for someone who thrives in fast-moving environments and cares deeply about execution quality.

Beyond managing timelines and deliverables, you’ll help refine how brands show up in our games, contribute ideas that elevate integrations, and ensure our client-facing materials are thoughtful and compelling.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Account Management
   
   - Serve as the primary client relationship owner across active partnerships, managing both day-to-day execution and strategic decisions end-to-end.
   
   - Ensure scope clarity and protect game team bandwidth by proactively identifying misalignment, unrealistic timelines, or unapproved feature requests before they escalate.
   
   - Act as a liaison between the client and the Voldex game teams
   
   - Ensure accountability for project action items and deliverables, holding both external clients and internal teams accountable

 - Analytical Review
   
   - Conduct mid & post campaign analysis on campaign data to provide actionable insights to clients following the conclusion of their campaign
   
   - Organize and develop insights into presentable decks that can be shared externally
   
   - Present campaign results and findings of both quantitative and qualitative analysis

 - Process Management
   
   - Ensure that projects are adhering to internal processes and timelines
   
   - Own and evolve internal partnership team processes, building repeatable frameworks for pitch development, approvals, and reporting

 - Creative Concepting
   
   - Lead creative concepting for upcoming brand activations and go-to-market packages, ideating experiences that are immersive, authentic, and tailored to each partner
   
   - Help with the rollout of new packages and offerings from Voldex to its sales partners and clients
   
   - Create compelling, customized pitch decks and external-facing materials tailored to each brand’s target audience and objectives

 - Opportunity Identification
   
   - Assist in identifying opportunities in the market with new and existing brands
   
   - Own the renewal and upsell process for existing clients, driving incremental growth through forward-looking strategies and proactive account management




WHO YOU ARE

 - Required:
   
   - 5+ years of experience in partnerships, creative strategy, account or project management roles
   
   - Strong gaming knowledge, preferably in UGC platforms (Roblox, Fortnite or Minecraft)
   
   - Strong verbal and written communications skills
   
   - Keen organizational skills
   
   - Flexibility to work across regions and timezones

 - Nice to Have:
   
   - Familiarity with Roblox
   
   - Experience with tools like Monday.com http://Monday.com, Asana, Trello, etc.
   
   - Prior experience in account management for a gaming company or agency
   
   - Experience working with AAA organizations (Eg; The LEGO Group, Universal Pictures, The NFL, etc.)
   
   - Experience working with large agency partners (Eg; Publicis, Dentsu, Wavemaker, etc.)

source_jobs.title: Sr. Manager, Data Analytics
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.

Responsibilities:

 - Lead, mentor, and develop a team of four analysts embedded across Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football, providing clear direction, feedback, and growth opportunities.

 - Own the analytics function's centralized roadmap covering tooling, instrumentation, automation, and enablement priorities.

 - Partner with each game team's product manager and analysts to maintain a prioritized backlog of analytics work aligned to their roadmap.

 - Establish and maintain high standards for analytical methodology across the portfolio, including A/B testing governance, telemetry design, and data storytelling.

 - Identify and drive opportunities to automate reporting, improve self-serve access to data, and incorporate AI tooling to raise the team's output.

 - Ensure the team is producing clear, decision-oriented outputs that are trusted by game leads and leadership.

 - Create systems for knowledge sharing across the analytics team, including regular analysis reviews, shared documentation, reusable templates, cross-game learnings, and opportunities for analysts to present work to one another.

Requirements:

 - 5+ years of experience in analytics or data science, with at least 2 years managing or leading an analytics team.

 - Demonstrated ability to develop analysts at multiple levels, with a track record of raising the quality and impact of a team's output.

 - Deep expertise in A/B testing and experimentation: hypothesis design, power analysis, statistical significance, and communicating results to non-technical stakeholders.

 - Advanced SQL skills and fluency across a modern data stack including data warehousing, BI tooling, and analytics engineering.

 - Strong understanding of consumer product KPIs, particularly retention, engagement, and monetization in a live service or F2P context.

 - Clear point of view on where AI and automation can improve how an analytics team operates, with experience driving adoption.

 - Excellent cross-functional communication skills; able to translate data into decisions for both technical and executive audiences.

Nice to Have:

 - Experience in games, particularly live service, mobile F2P, or UGC platforms such as Roblox or Fortnite.

 - Familiarity with dbt for analytics engineering and data modeling.

 - Python proficiency for deeper analysis or automation.

Bonus Points for:

 - Familiarity with Roblox as a platform, either as a developer, analyst, or player.

 - Experience working with licensed IP in a gaming context.

Tech Stack:

While experience with the following tech stack is NOT expected or necessary for candidates, please see below Voldex’s tech stack in case you are interested:

 - Snowflake

 - Tableau

 - dbt

 - Python

 - AWS

 - We offer licences for Claude Code, Codex, and ChatGPT

Location/Level:

 - Remote - Canada

 - Travel - 2 to 3x / year (onboarding, RDC + possible team meet-ups)

 - Time Zone - must be willing to work EST/PST hours



Voldex is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status or any legally protected status



Permanent Voldex employees enjoy the following benefits:

💰 Competitive compensation - above-market salary + profit sharing + stock options

⛳️ Retirement benefits  - company contribution to your retirement plan (401k, RRSP, Pension), in Canada, UK and USA!

🩺 Medical, dental, and vision ben

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - NFL Universe Football
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

We’re looking for a Software Engineer to join the NFL Universe Football team — a live-operated sports experience built in partnership with the NFL 🏈. This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys building high-quality gameplay systems, collaborating closely with cross-functional teammates, and shipping features that directly impact a massive player community.

You’ll work on a fast-moving product team focused on delivering engaging live content, improving core systems, and continuously enhancing the player experience through thoughtful technical execution.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and launch features that delight millions of players daily

 - Own and deliver gameplay features end-to-end, from implementation through release and iteration

 - Break down product requirements into technical tasks and provide reliable estimates

 - Write clean, performant, and maintainable Roblox Lua code aligned with team standards

 - Design and implement systems with consideration for scalability, performance, and maintainability

 - Partner with designers, artists, and producers to build high-quality gameplay experiences

 - Monitor live features, analyze performance, and address issues proactively

 - Identify and improve codebase quality, development workflows, and system reliability

 - Participate actively in code reviews and contribute to team engineering practices

 - Playtest features and proactively improve player experience (UX, responsiveness, polish)




WHO YOU ARE

 - 1–3+ years of Roblox or relevant game development experience

 - Strong foundation in CS fundamentals and problem-solving

 - Experience shipping features or games in a production environment

 - Excellent communication, ownership, and collaborative mindset

 - Ability to work independently on feature development with moderate guidance

 - Strong communication and cross-functional collaboration skills

 - Familiarity with version control and collaborative development workflows



Nice to Have:

 - Bachelor’s degree in CS/Software Engineering or equivalent experience working in a development team

 - Shipped games or features on Roblox or similar platforms

 - Game jam or modding experience

 - Familiarity with live game systems (analytics, economy tuning, balancing)

 - Experience optimizing performance in multiplayer or real-time systems




TECH STACK

 - Roblox Lua scripting

 - Backend services (AWS,Golang)

 - Analytics pipelines (Snowflake,Tableau)

 - Collaboration tools: GitHub, Discord

We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status or any legally protected status

🏖 Flexible PTO - vacations + Federal / Bank Holidays

source_jobs.title: QA Tester - Brookhaven
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

Brookhaven is one of the leading roleplay games on Roblox, and every update matters. You’ll think like a player, test like a creator, and partner closely with designers and developers to protect the player experience.

🌟 If you live and breathe Roblox, notice the small details others miss, and love being the last line of defence before launch — this is your opportunity to make a huge impact on a game played by millions.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Test Brookhaven in both a LIVE and QA environment across Mobile, Tablet, PC, and Console, ensuring comprehensive coverage & that issues are identified early

 - Reproduce and document issues with complete supporting materials (logs, screenshots, reproduction steps)

 - Conduct testing from a player-experience perspective, representing Brookhaven’s community voice

 - Collaborate with the QA Lead to create and execute comprehensive test plans which anticipate issues ahead of release

 - Work closely with other QA testers by communicating progress, risks, and test results clearly to ensure effective coverage across tests




WHO YOU ARE

 - Proficient in written and spoken English communication

 - Experience as an active player on the Roblox platform with a strong understanding of Roblox player behaviour

 - Excellent attention to detail and ability to identify inconsistencies, issues, or things that don’t look right

 - Ability to clearly and concisely present complex information in an understandable way

 - Strong organizational skills with the ability to prioritize and meet deadlines

 - Able to remain focused and methodical when approaching repetitive or high-volume tasks

 - Ability to work and communicate effectively with people at all levels

 - Ability to work full-time (40+ hours per week)

 - Be 18 years of age or older



Nice to Have

 - Previous experience working on Roblox games professionally

 - Prior experience working in QA




TECH STACK

 - While experience with the following tech stack is NOT expected or necessary for candidates, please see below Voldex’s tech stack in case you are interested:
   
   - Monday.com http://monday.com
   
   - Google Suite
   
   - Discord

Voldex is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status or any legally protected status



Permanent Voldex employees enjoy the following benefits:

💰 Competitive compensation - above-market salary + profit sharing + stock options

🩺 Medical, dental, and vision benefits - depending on the country, there may be additional benefits (Life, ADD, etc…) such as Canada, UK and USA.

🏖 Flexible PTO - vacations + Federal / Bank Holidays

🌎 Remote First - we have always been remote and will remain that way including work from home/anywhere 

🎮 In-person get-togethers, virtual company-wide game events, Robux allowances, and so much more!

🎉 Work with awesome people and impact millions of daily players

source_jobs.title: Marketing Specialist - NFL Universe Football
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

NFL Universe Football is one of the leading sports experiences on Roblox, with a highly active player base and constant live updates. We’re looking for a Marketing Specialist to help fuel that momentum — using creative testing, fast iteration, and a deep understanding of how games grow on the platform!

This is a highly execution-focused role for someone who enjoys being in the weeds: experimenting, shipping, and learning quickly. It’s not about long-term strategy decks, but about running ideas, seeing what works, and doubling down in real time.

🏈 You’ll own how NFL Universe Football shows up both on-platform (thumbnails, icons, discovery optimization) and off-platform (social, community, and creators), working closely with Product, Art, and Community to turn every update into something players notice and engage with.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Roblox Page & Asset Optimization (Primary Focus)

 - Come up with ideas for thumbnails, icons, and Roblox page visuals

 - Work with our artists to brief and refine visual concepts (you won’t be creating 3D renders yourself)

 - Publish and test assets directly on Roblox

 - Review performance dashboards and identify what’s working (and what isn’t)

 - Recommend and execute the next round of experiments based on results

Social & Community Content

 - Create, capture, edit, and publish short-form gameplay content for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram, X, and Discord

 - Build a repeatable content engine for NFLUF, including evergreen videos, update hype, gameplay moments, creator-style edits, and content tied to NFL season beats

 - Work closely with Product, Art, and the NFLUF team to turn weekly updates, events, and releases into player-facing content

 - Bring inspiration from other Roblox games and creator communities

Projects & Growth Experiments

 - Support creator or YouTuber experiments

 - Contribute to new ideas that drive player growth or engagement

 - Help move ad-hoc projects forward when there’s an opportunity to test something new




WHO YOU ARE

 - Strong familiarity with Roblox — as a player, creator, community member, or someone who deeply understands Roblox content and player behavior

 - Hands-on experience creating short-form content for social platforms such as TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, or X

 - Comfortable capturing gameplay, finding strong moments, editing video, adding hooks/captions/audio, and publishing content that feels native to the platform

 - Experience using video editing tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut, or similar; you should be beyond basic mobile-only edits

 - Strong instincts for what makes gaming content engaging: hooks, pacing, thumbnails, captions, trends, memes, community moments, and shareability

 - Proof that you have taken content or creative ideas from concept → capture/edit → publish → performance review

 - Comfortable looking at social analytics, Roblox dashboards, and basic spreadsheets to explain what is happening at a practical level

 - Excited by creative testing and iteration — you like trying ideas, learning quickly, and improving based on results

 - Able to manage your own content pipeline, prioritize work, and keep momentum in a fast-moving live game environment

 - Comfortable collaborating with Product, Art, Community, creators, and other stakeholders while still owning your lane

 - Interest in American football, sports culture, live events, and fan hype moments — or a strong willingness to learn quickly

You don’t need years of professional experienc

source_jobs.title: 2D Art Generalist - NFL Universe Football
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

🏈 NFL Universe Football is one of Roblox's leading sports experiences, bringing authentic NFL action to millions of players around the world. We're looking for a creative and versatile 2D Generalist to own the execution of the game's 2D art across UI, seasonal events, and marketing experiences.

In this role, you'll create everything from icons, menus, HUDs, and pop-up screens to event branding, animated emojis, banners, and in-game offers. You'll collaborate closely with Designers, Engineers, and Artists to craft polished, engaging visuals that enhance the player experience and bring new features, seasons, and live events to life.

We're looking for someone who loves games, thrives in a collaborative environment, and is excited to create art that resonates with Roblox players and football fans alike.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Design high-quality 2D assets for NFL Universe Football, including UI elements (buttons, icons, menus, HUDs, and pop-ups) as well as promotional and seasonal content such as banners, event graphics, animated emojis, and in-game offers

 - Collaborate closely with Engineers, Designers, and cross-functional partners to iterate on layouts, interactions, and visual states that enhance the player experience

 - Maintain and evolve the game's visual language by working within established style guides while contributing new ideas and improvements where appropriate

 - Ensure all interface and visual assets are intuitive, readable, and optimized across desktop, mobile, and console experiences

 - Contribute to UI and UX discussions by providing thoughtful feedback and helping improve usability, clarity, and overall visual quality

 - Participate actively in team meetings, including art reviews, scrums, and 1:1s, while contributing to a collaborative and feedback-oriented creative culture




WHO YOU ARE

 - A strong portfolio that demonstrates polished 2D UI and 2D assets within a game environment

 - Strong foundation in drawing, composition, color theory, and visual storytelling

 - Proficiency in Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects/Premiere, or comparable design software

 - Hands-on experience with creating functional UI elements for game titles

 - Understanding of production pipelines and asset optimization

 - Strong communication skills across all channels used in our remote working environment, along with the ability to take and apply constructive feedback



Nice to Have

 - Understanding of how 2D interface and promotional assets integrate with and complement 3D game environments

 - Experience working with Roblox Studio's UI systems, asset pipelines, and image requirements

 - Familiarity with Roblox ScreenGui hierarchies, responsive UI design, resolution scaling, and multi-device input considerations

 - Ability to prepare and organize UI assets in Roblox Studio in a way that enables smooth implementation by engineering teams

 - Passion for football, sports, or sports entertainment

 - Strong awareness of Gen Alpha culture, including gaming trends, memes, creators, fashion, and internet culture

 - Deep familiarity with the Roblox platform, community, and player experience




TECH STACK

You may use some or all of the following tools:

 - Photoshop

 - Figma or equivalent software

 - Illustrator

 - After Effects, Premiere or Toonboom

 - Roblox Studio

 

Voldex is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disa

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Brookhaven
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

Brookhaven is one of the largest experiences on Roblox, with millions of players jumping in every day. At Voldex, we’re looking for a Software Engineer to help build the next chapter of the game — from new features and gameplay systems to technical improvements that keep the experience polished, scalable, and fun. ✨

You’ll collaborate closely with designers, artists, and producers, write clean and maintainable Roblox Lua code, and ship updates that reach a massive global player base. If you’re excited by live games, fast iteration, and the opportunity to make an impact on a title played by millions, this could be a great fit.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and launch features that delight millions of players daily

 - Write clean, performant, and maintainable Roblox Lua code

 - Partner closely with designers, artists, and producers to craft compelling gameplay experiences

 - Debug, optimize, and improve live game systems

 - Elevate the technical quality and performance of our games

 - Playtest regularly and provide thoughtful design and product feedback

Our engineers don’t just ship code — they help shape the player experience.




WHO YOU ARE

 - Strong foundation in CS fundamentals and problem-solving

 - Familiarity with game engines, scripting languages, version control

 - Excellent communication and collaborative mindset

 - 2+ years of Roblox development experience
   
   

Nice to Have:

 - Bachelor’s degree in CS/Software Engineering or equivalent development experience

 - Experience working in game teams

 - Shipped games or features on Roblox or similar platforms

 - Game jam or modding experience

 - Familiarity with live game systems (analytics, economy tuning, balancing)

 - 2+ years professional software development experience
   
   


TECH STACK

 - Roblox Lua scripting

 - Backend services (AWS,Golang)

 - Analytics pipelines (Snowflake,Tableau)

 - Collaboration tools: GitHub, Discord

Voldex is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status or any legally protected status



Permanent Voldex employees enjoy the following benefits:

💰 Competitive compensation - above-market salary + profit sharing + stock options

⛳️ Retirement benefits  - company contribution to your retirement plan (401k, RRSP, Pension), in Canada, UK and USA!

🩺 Medical, dental, and vision benefits - depending on the country, there may be additional benefits (Life, ADD, etc…) such as Canada, UK and USA.

🏖 Flexible PTO - vacations + Federal / Bank Holidays

🌎 Remote First - we have always been remote and will remain that way including work from home/anywhere 

🎮 In-person get-togethers, virtual company-wide game events, Robux allowances, and so much more!

🎓Professional Development - Reimburse the costs of courses, materials, and anything to help further their training and growth



🎉 Work with awesome people and impact millions of daily players

Want to learn more about Voldex? Read about us here:

 - Voldex Acquires Brookhaven, most visited game on Roblox https://voldex.com/news/voldex-acquires-brookhaven-the-most-visited-game-on-roblox/ 

 - Driving Empire & NASCAR: Brand Partnership https://voldex.com/news/voldex-partners-with-nascar-to-launch-dynamic-year-long-racing-experience-in-driving-empire/ 

 - Voldex & NFL: Brand Partnership https://voldex.com/news/voldex-nfl-press-release/

source_jobs.title: Partnership Sales Lead
source_jobs.description:
Voldex is a leading gaming company focused on Roblox, the most exciting ecosystem in gaming today. We are home to several of Roblox's top games, including Brookhaven, Driving Empire, and NFL Universe Football. With over 160 million monthly active players across our games, we are one of the biggest Roblox studios by audience size. Founded in 2015, we have since grown to 95+ full-time remote team members across the globe.


ROLE OVERVIEW

The Partnerships Sales Lead is Voldex's first dedicated sales hire and will be a key driver of new brand partnerships business across our portfolio of games, including Brookhaven (the #1 roleplay game and most-visited game on Roblox ever), Driving Empire (the #1 driving game), and NFL Universe Football (the #1 football game). 🚀

Working closely with our Brand Partnerships team of strategists and account managers, you'll be responsible for building, managing, and closing a high-quality pipeline of brand opportunities across entertainment, toy companies, QSR, consumer goods, and other major marketing verticals.

This is a high-visibility, high-ownership role for someone who thrives on building relationships from scratch, loves the hunt, and wants to play a foundational role in shaping how Voldex shows up in the broader brand and agency ecosystem. You'll build deep relationships directly with senior marketing stakeholders at the world's largest consumer brands, as well as with the agency teams that plan and manage their spend (e.g. WPP, Publicis, Dentsu, etc.), ensuring Voldex is considered for all relevant marketing opportunities and RFPs.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Pipeline Generation
   
   - Generate a consistent flow of qualified leads through conferences, word of mouth, existing relationships, outbound outreach, and warm introductions
   
   - Filter and prioritize leads to focus time and energy on the highest-quality opportunities
   
   - Build credible relationships with key decision-makers on the gaming teams at major holding companies (e.g. Omnicom, Publicis, WPP, Dentsu) that manage gaming marketing spend
   
   - Build direct relationships with brands, with a focus on top entertainment, toy company, CPG, and QSR organizations

 - Deal Closing
   
   - Turn qualified leads into closed, revenue-generating partnerships
   
   - Own follow-up and pipeline hygiene to ensure leads don't go cold
   
   - Close revenue both directly with brands and through marketing agencies
   
   - Ensure Voldex is included in relevant RFP conversations from gaming-focused agencies and brands

 - Cross-functional Collaboration
   
   - Partner closely with the Brand Partnerships team to develop proposals, pitch decks, and go-to-market packages for qualified leads
   
   - Provide clear, regular updates on pipeline status and deal progress to the Brand Partnerships team and your manager via CRM or other shared process
   
   - Set realistic expectations with clients during the sales process to support a smooth handoff to the account management team post-sale

 - Market & Industry Insight
   
   - Bring an informed point of view on how brands currently spend on gaming activations, and use that knowledge to shape how Voldex goes to market
   
   - Share market feedback and trends to help refine Voldex's partnership offerings and positioning




WHO YOU ARE

 - Required:
   
   - 6+ years of digital/gaming media sales experience
   
   - 2+ years of experience successfully selling gaming advertising integrations into UGC gaming platforms (Roblox preferred)
   
   - Established relationships with media/marketing agencies that manage gaming marketing budgets, with a track record of getting brands or platforms into RFP conversations
   
   - Strong track record of generating pipeline and closing six- and seven-figure advertising/integration deals
   
   - Excellent relationship-building skills with senior marketers and agency planners
   
   - Clear, proactive communicator who can collaborate effectively with cross-fu

notes: Gaming company with multiple Roblox games, strong engineering focus
